title: Per-Account Risk Profile Config & account_id Parameterisation
summary: Two linked tasks: (1) Replace flat global CONFIG with account-aware profile system — each account ID maps to its own strategy type, risk tolerance, and position limits. (2) Audit every function in orders.py and risk.py that reads CONFIG[active_account] directly and replace with account_id as a parameter. Both are required before multi-account routing works correctly.
approach: Add account_profiles dict to config.py keyed by account ID. Each profile holds: strategy_type (options/longs/scalping), min_score_threshold, max_positions, risk_per_trade_pct, max_hold_time, stop_loss_rule, kill_switch_enabled, claude_api_key. Global CONFIG values serve as fallback when a profile key is absent.
